lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਜੇ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਲੋਚਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin karamaa kichhoo na paaeeai je bahut lochaahee |
lines.english: Without good karma, he does not obtain anything, no matter how much he may wish for it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਜੰਮੈ ਮਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਛੁਟਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: aavai jaae jamai marai gur sabad chhuttaahee |
lines.english: Coming and going in reincarnation, and birth and death are ended, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰੈ ਕਿਸੁ ਆਖੀਐ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: aap karai kis aakheeai doojaa ko naahee |16|
lines.english: He Himself acts, so unto whom should we complain? There is no other at all. ||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਸੰਤੀ ਧਨੁ ਖਟਿਆ ਜਿਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis jag meh santee dhan khattiaa jinaa satigur miliaa prabh aae |
lines.english: In this world, the Saints earn the wealth; they come to meet God through the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਇਸੁ ਧਨ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sach drirraaeaa is dhan kee keemat kahee na jaae |
lines.english: The True Guru implants the Truth within; the value of this wealth cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿੰਨੑਾ ਕਉ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa kau dhur likhiaa tinee paaeaa aae |
lines.english: Only those who have such pre-ordained destiny, come to receive this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤੁ ਧਨਿ ਪਾਇਐ ਭੁਖ ਲਥੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: eit dhan paaeiai bhukh lathee sukh vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: Obtaining this wealth, hunger is relieved, and peace comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਕਦੇ ਆਵਈ ਨਹ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: saant na kade aavee neh sukh vasai man aae |
lines.english: It never finds calm tranquility, and peace never comes to dwell in its mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਨਿਰਧਨੁ ਹੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਨੋ ਬਿਲਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh jagat niradhan hai maaeaa no bilalaae |
lines.english: The world of the self-willed manmukh is poor, crying out for Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਫਿਰਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਕਦੇ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin firadaa sadaa rahai bhukh na kade jaae |
lines.english: Night and day, it wanders continually, and its hunger is never relieved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਚਿੰਤ ਚਿਤਵਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਸਹਸਾ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa chint chitavadaa rahai sahasaa kade na jaae |
lines.english: It is always plagued by anxiety, and its cynicism never departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਤਿ ਭਵੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨੋ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak vin satigur mat bhavee satigur no milai taa sabad kamaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Guru, the intellect is perverted; if one meets the True Guru, then one practices the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖ ਮਹਿ ਰਹੈ ਸਚੇ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa sadaa sukh meh rahai sache maeh samaae |1|
lines.english: Forever and ever, he dwells in peace, and merges in the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਭਾਇਰਹੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eko simarahu bhaaeirahu tis bin avar na koe |
lines.english: Meditate in remembrance on the One Lord, O Siblings of Destiny; there is none other than Him.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਸੋਈ ਸਾਰ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin upaaee medanee soee saar karee |
lines.english: The One who created the world, takes care of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਣਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ਜਿਤੁ ਖਾਧੈ ਸਦਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: khaanaa sabad changiaaeea jit khaadhai sadaa tripat hoe |
lines.english: So eat the food of the Shabad and goodness; eating it, you shall remain satisfied forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੈਨਣੁ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਸਨਾਇ ਹੈ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਓਹੁ ਊਜਲਾ ਮੈਲਾ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: painan sifat sanaae hai sadaa sadaa ohu aoojalaa mailaa kade na hoe |
lines.english: Dress yourself in the Praise of the Lord. Forever and ever, it is radiant and bright; it is never polluted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਸਚੁ ਧਨੁ ਖਟਿਆ ਥੋੜਾ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje sach dhan khattiaa thorraa kade na hoe |
lines.english: I have intuitively earned the true wealth, which never decreases.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੀ ਨੋ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: dehee no sabad seegaar hai jit sadaa sadaa sukh hoe |
lines.english: The body is adorned with the Shabad, and is at peace forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਵਿਖਾਲੇ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh bujheeai jis no aap vikhaale soe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh realizes the Lord, who reveals Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੰਜਮੋ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: antar jap tap sanjamo gurasabadee jaapai |
lines.english: Deep within the self are meditation and austere self-discipline, when one realizes the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਹਉਮੈ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਗਵਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam dhiaaeeai haumai agiaan gavaapai |
lines.english: Meditating on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, egotism and ignorance are eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਭਰਪੂਰੁ ਹੈ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਸਾਦੁ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: andar amrit bharapoor hai chaakhiaa saad jaapai |
lines.english: One's inner being is overflowing with Ambrosial Nectar; tasting it, the flavor is known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਚਾਖਿਆ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਭਏ ਸੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਧ੍ਰਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin chaakhiaa se nirbhau bhe se har ras dhraapai |
lines.english: Those who taste it become fearless; they are satisfied with the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਪੀਆਇਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਵਿਆਪੈ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: har kirapaa dhaar peeaeaa fir kaal na viaapai |17|
lines.english: Those who drink it in, by the Grace of the Lord, are never again afflicted by death. ||17||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਕੁ ਅਵਗਣਾ ਕੀ ਬੰਨੑੈ ਗੰਠੜੀ ਗੁਣ ਨ ਵਿਹਾਝੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: lok avaganaa kee banai ganttharree gun na vihaajhai koe |
lines.english: People tie up bundles of demerits; no one deals in virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਗੁਣ ਪਾਈਅਨੑਿ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee gun paaeeana jis no nadar karee |1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one is blessed with virtue, when the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਕਾ ਗਾਹਕੁ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun kaa gaahak naanakaa viralaa koee hoe |
lines.english: Rare is that person, O Nanak, who purchases virtue.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਸਮਾਨਿ ਹਹਿ ਜਿ ਆਪਿ ਕੀਤੇ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gun avagun samaan heh ji aap keete karataar |
lines.english: Merits and demerits are the same; they are both created by the Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak hukam maniai sukh paaeeai gurasabadee veechaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who obeys the Hukam of the Lord's Command, finds peace, contemplating the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਦਰੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਅਸਰਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee dar jaaneeai andar mehal asaraau |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the Lord's Court is known; within the self is the Sanctuary, the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰਾਜਾ ਤਖਤੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਨਿਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: andar raajaa takhat hai aape kare niaau |
lines.english: The King sits on the throne within the self; He Himself administers justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਰੇ ਪਰਖਿ ਖਜਾਨੈ ਪਾਈਅਨਿ ਖੋਟਿਆ ਨਾਹੀ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khare parakh khajaanai paaeean khottiaa naahee thaau |
lines.english: The coins are assayed, and the genuine coins are placed in His treasury, while the counterfeit ones find no place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੁ ਨਿਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabh sacho sach varatadaa sadaa sach niaau |
lines.english: The Truest of the True is all-pervading; His justice is forever True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਮੈ ਕਰੀ ਤਾਂ ਤੂ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੂ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਹਉ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: hau mai karee taan too naahee too hoveh hau naeh |
lines.english: When one acts in egotism, then You are not there, Lord. Wherever You are, there is no ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਕਾ ਰਸੁ ਆਇਆ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਨਾਉ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: amrit kaa ras aaeaa man vasiaa naau |18|
lines.english: One comes to enjoy the Ambrosial essence, when the Name is enshrined in the mind. ||18||
